title: Unobtanium
description:
nyaaaa~ welcome to my mod about a mystical new ore called unobtanium! also happy new years 2008!
(this mod was for flashfest april fools 2023)
body:
nyaaaa~ welcome to my mod about a mystical new ore called unobtanium! also happy new years 2008!
This mod adds a new material to the game craftable with netherite and baguettes. It's very overpowered, too, and can be used to make armor and tools.

## Disclaimer
This is an April fool's joke. I would never actually make a mod like this. This is actually based on my first mod that I made a long long time ago (back in the olden days of 1.14!).
